Hearing held. Discussed not ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., SERGIY VLADYCHKIN MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S STATMENTS OF DISPUTED FACTS AND MATERIAL FACTS IS GRANTED.

Plaintiff's opposing separate statements do not comply with CCP 437c(b)(3) or CRC 3.1350. The documents (1) fail to cite opposing evidence (CCP 437c(b)(3); CRC 3.1350(f)(2)); (2) do not "unequivocally" state whether a fact is disputed or undisputed (CRC 3.1350(f)(2)); (3) improperly assert her own facts that are merely background (not material) and do not dispute defendants' facts; and (4) include improper argument.

The court continues the motions for summary judgment to April 22, 2026. Plaintiff must file and serve compliant opposing separate statements by April 8, 2026. Defendant may file a supplemental reply by April 15, 2026. All parties to provide courtesy copies of their filings in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7(B). Additionally, plaintiff shall provide a courtesy copy of all of its opposition. The compendium of evidence shall be properly bound and tabbed. Please attach a cover letter that confirms the new hearing date. Any request for a trial continuance should be directed to the Presiding Judge in department 206.

Order is signed.
